race.description: Follow Kilbeggan On Social Media Handicap Hurdle
race.comment: CHANCEAWETMORNING (11) held excuses when pulled up at Ayr. Much better judged on 2.5L second at Fairyhouse start before that. These conditions will suit and rates as the clear one to beat. DESERT HAVEN (12) posted a good effort running 11L fifth in a competitive Fairyhouse race last time. This is easier and can go closer as a result. Expect a big performance. KABYLIA (2) finished down field on reappearance. Is a lot better than that at best though and should strip fitter and improve now. Keep safe. JERRARI (1) is eased in grade. This is more realistic and has competed well here in the past. Big each way claims.
